title: Add suffix tar to file after buildah push docker-archive
body:
```
# buildah push docker.io/library/busybox docker-archive:busybox:latest
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:daacdb2949be2c830e78b878ff144e38132faee2c2dcc20a544a5e0460fbdbf3
 0 B / 698.35 KiB [------------------------------------------------------------]
Copying config sha256:5d15d1986ee095583c90f6e3693edffa92863da262489663fa4cc912e3822ed6
 0 B / 1.41 KiB [--------------------------------------------------------------]
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
[root@fedora ~]# ls busybox
busybox
[root@fedora ~]# file busybox
busybox: POSIX tar archive
```

Suggest to name it `busybox.tar` or `busybox.tar.gz`.

comments.body:
It works in this way.

```
[root@fedora ~]# buildah push docker.io/library/nginx:latest docker-archive:busybox.tar:latest
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:ee1a8002360e897670d7edcc6bfde440f064aa014793e7e7a5dc049a01459299
 0 B / 21.45 MiB [-------------------------------------------------------------]
Copying blob sha256:12c9ee9bfbc78f3c69092d8aed395fc85db739c90fb8f128c7896c1a03102fdb
 21.45 MiB / 21.45 MiB [=======================================================]
Copying blob sha256:8481764ad3d61d907eceeaad333bb20b0da6c28c4420e6cfc712aee24f82b5ae
 0 B / 194 B [-----------------------------------------------------------------]
Copying config sha256:f9d0b34137e01c8699356f8caf45bbcf2df678840a020eeca51d19b81467def2
 0 B / 4.69 KiB [--------------------------------------------------------------]
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
```
